name: =?utf-8?Q?Amash=20HQ?=
subject: Let's compare records
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AMASH FOR AMERICA EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE**
body:
| | |
---
| | [ ](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=3e5e2be7b3&e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| | Hi there,

Whether you just signed up or have been with us since the beginning, we're glad you're here.

We know not everyone is as familiar with Justin's record as we are, so we're here to give you details on some of the key differences between him and the two other guys.

Let's look at criminal justice reform.

As more Americans have become aware of the costs of our massive, unjust criminal justice system, we're seeing more politicians supporting reforms on the campaign trail—but that's not enough to know where the candidate really stands on these issues.

For that, you have to look at the candidate's record.

**Biden's and Trump's records on criminal justice demonstrate their belief in brutal, ineffective "tough on crime" measures.**

In contrast, Justin has consistently opposed these kinds of unjust policies.

In Congress, Justin has **opposed:**
* Mandatory minimums
* Militarizing local police
* Civil asset forfeiture
* Expanding the death penalty
* Efforts to kill state-level bail reform
* New, unconstitutional federal crimes
* Empowering the attorney general to expand the drug war

And he's done more than simply vote against these policies. **Justin has also prioritized criminal justice issues in picking his policy battles and legislative initiatives.**

Even on little-noticed bills, Justin fought to organize against punitive policies that further entrench our broken system.

Now, compare that to the records of Biden and Trump.

In office, **Trump has reversed limits on civil asset forfeiture, moved to resume federal executions after a 17-year hiatus, and lifted restrictions on transferring military equipment to state and local police departments.**

Trump has chosen attorneys general that follow the disastrous "tough on crime" philosophy, including encouraging prosecutors to seek harsh penalties, reversing policies that discourage federal marijuana prosecutions in states where marijuana is legal, and attacking local prosecutors for seeking meaningful criminal justice reforms.

Biden's record is similarly appalling.

In the Senate, **Biden supported—and was often instrumental in writing—many of the bills that created, restored, and bolstered punitive criminal justice policies at the federal level.**

Biden was one of the key members of Congress helping to build up the federal drug war, including through his 1994 crime bill. As noted by a 2014 article in [Vanity Fair](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=7dac2c188c&e=b1055dcfe8):

> _Biden was the author of the 1994 crime bill, which vastly increased the numbers of police on the streets, eliminated Pell grant access for prisoners, expanded the death penalty, and strongly increased Border Patrol presence. This criminalization and militarization of Americans’ public-safety concerns has continued under President Obama. As Radley Balko writes, the Obama administration has increased the budget for Community Oriented Policing Services (COPS) and Byrne grants, both of which finance local police departments in their efforts to wage heavy-handed drug and crime war operations._

Even today, Biden refuses to fully account for his mistakes. And he continues to hold backwards views on criminal justice policy, like opposing the legalization of marijuana.

The results are clear:

**Justin is the only candidate we can trust to fight for real changes to the criminal justice system.**

[**You can help stop these other guys and support our fight for a brighter, freer future by donating now.**](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=701557206f&e=b1055dcfe8)

---
| [Chip in >>]( "Chip in >>")
---
| Thank you. We're so grateful for your support.

—Team Amash

---

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: Update from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AEn5Yv9NQpMQQ1t5w7GlUd5Iw9yHuoN1y6TL6OLtyB_v4YZiyvyrJrsSsuHFQy2WlojdlgBg--V1VF0V9KMKgt_q3bplI8oCyo0avyE37TxA-dqcJlboJnFfc6H2axIJKngC2_SxOh3n6joi1-uE_nPGgUJGUUZbxo259oGynmhzBM6rT3k93w==&c=9p54tO2b3d_ZAll4BFsVTuV9soLQ7hjVbOlPmtSiBrGn-ooXi2t92w==&ch=MjdZFc795Fon1larisoX-0MP72y_WBlZBdaelozGon8jTylt1-F5cA==)
---
| Peter,

---
| Texas is cautiously starting to reopen, and I'm optimistic that we will settle into some variation of "normal" soon.
However for the time being, we are still campaigning from home. This week, we celebrated Teacher Appreciation Week.
These are unique and challenging times for our state's teachers, as well as students and parents, so please make sure to thank a teacher for their hard work!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AEn5Yv9NQpMQQ1t5w7GlUd5Iw9yHuoN1y6TL6OLtyB_v4YZiyvyrJo9LDXvzgyNQ5_0nagvEVhaK_OXQC0sTHLx7zqSgJYLxcjWR5b9q7NVNUl153iAUEQFb8oy7JGG2nfA_9tqFon-GC_xq-G8_xi1NW_tZLamZXq0udhnG2nG2igBh4qlJMXG_xKe_1yFC&c=9p54tO2b3d_ZAll4BFsVTuV9soLQ7hjVbOlPmtSiBrGn-ooXi2t92w==&ch=MjdZFc795Fon1larisoX-0MP72y_WBlZBdaelozGon8jTylt1-F5cA==)
---
| We also recognized National Nurses Day on Wednesday. Many nurses have been working incredibly hard and putting in extra hours over the last couple of months, fighting on the front lines of this COVID-19 pandemic.
We thank them for doing everything they can to keep members of our communities safe and healthy.
---
| | |
---
| Yesterday was the annual National Day of Prayer. It is in these trying times that many of us see the need for God's help more than ever.
And finally, Texas reached an important milestone today with the reopening of barbershops and salons.
COVID-19 will likely be with us for a long time, so it's important that we learn how to live with it while being smart and taking appropriate precautions. Limiting occupancy, distancing, requiring masks, etc. can go a long way toward ensuring that businesses are safe for both the employees and customers.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AEn5Yv9NQpMQQ1t5w7GlUd5Iw9yHuoN1y6TL6OLtyB_v4YZiyvyrJo9LDXvzgyNQUvTVvuk5sYEkjU1sKFyCe27cRgYpVQdodsRf7YDiFQogV7rbwOKTP9axtWsxgo5Y7kJeBVov1CU=&c=9p54tO2b3d_ZAll4BFsVTuV9soLQ7hjVbOlPmtSiBrGn-ooXi2t92w==&ch=MjdZFc795Fon1larisoX-0MP72y_WBlZBdaelozGon8jTylt1-F5cA==)
---
| As always, I hope you, your family, and all your loved ones are staying healthy and safe. If there is anything I or my campaign can do for you, don't hesitate to let me know.
Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins Candidate for Congressional District 32
---

name: Dean Browning
subject: fwd: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter Three – President Trump
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Believe me when I say this, I wanted to run a positive campaign...but my opponent won't have it. She is attempting to get through the primary by attacking me personally and saying things that simply are not true. Just like President Trump fight backs when attacked, I will do the same.
From day one, I have dedicated my campaign to help the great people of the Lehigh Valley and to support our great president, President Donald J. Trump.
But I'm afraid my opponent doesn't have your best interest in mind, and she certainly does NOT support our president.
It pains me to report Liberal Lying Lisa will do anything to get ahead, even lie to you regarding her support of the president.
While you may have heard her say she will "work with President Trump." The facts are that she refused to even utter his name at her own kickoff rally!"
How can we trust her to support our President when she doesn't even have the courage to embrace him on the campaign trail?
And to make matters worse, Liberal, Lying Lisa, joined the Never Trump movement with a maximum donation to John Kasich when he was running against President Trump.
, without your financial support, I am afraid we could have another anti-Trump RINO in congress.
Your contribution of only $5 or $10 will go a long way in spreading my pro-Trump, pro-freedom message! Can I count on you to make that contribution today?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ipISFDhvSWt2n53JW5W2G2ynBK7au0SQHtX5dfEZaHt2Vq0Bp601Ne7-IElxRVJM1jzvkg1EnzWcpilYg9GTHAvk3L91AyOseZlLaiZSnDH1TiUaQNoTtVtRe91qlyFpRjhnXvCNGN4x659GcPTtjuURrfEDzbCUZv7GTWX095-qg6mSQXZneg==&c=7xKwvXkk137tPEYJPEoglD9BLv6XqeNrgcPJVB5yDOGchj4iU91x4w==&ch=xBvemORDaufke6LfyicOZPnYJNsnU7fk8r1eGByRAlyAmKrVTcej5w==)
---
| Now, for me, supporting our president is a no brainer. However, other so-called "Republicans" in this race don't seem to have the same idea.
I need your help to continue to expose Liberal, Lying Lisa for who she really is, an anti-Trump swamp creature.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ipISFDhvSWt2n53JW5W2G2ynBK7au0SQHtX5dfEZaHt2Vq0Bp601Ne7-IElxRVJM1jzvkg1EnzWcpilYg9GTHAvk3L91AyOseZlLaiZSnDH1TiUaQNoTtVtRe91qlyFpRjhnXvCNGN4x659GcPTtjuURrfEDzbCUZv7GTWX095-qg6mSQXZneg==&c=7xKwvXkk137tPEYJPEoglD9BLv6XqeNrgcPJVB5yDOGchj4iU91x4w==&ch=xBvemORDaufke6LfyicOZPnYJNsnU7fk8r1eGByRAlyAmKrVTcej5w==)

For Freedom,

| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. - Did you know Liberal, Lying Lisa is ANTI-TRUMP?!?! Yes, it's true, and I need your help to fight back against the herd of RINOs.
Can I count on you to donate $5 or $10 today?

Friend,

We had all expected that the Saturday one month out from our primary election would be filled with campaign rallies and door-to-door campaigning. But that was before the coronavirus pandemic created so much grief and turmoil.

Nearly 30 million Americans lacked any health insurance whatsoever _before_ the coronavirus pandemic. Now more are losing coverage, with 33 million jobless claims in the past 7 weeks and Georgia’s Governor Brian Kemp recommending cuts to a Medicaid program he has already refused to expand.

Both of Georgia’s senators have disgraced our state with their self-interested actions after learning of the threat the coronavirus posed to the American public. Teresa has fought for justice in federal courts, governed one of America’s 25 best run cities as mayor, and drilled countless times as a public safety director. **She is who we need to face David Perdue to flip this Senate seat and lead during this crisis.**

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | | | | | Over 120,000 people have voted and 1.2 million more have requested their ballots for the June 9 Democratic Senate primary in Georgia. The Atlanta Journal-Constitution polling has most voters in this race undecided , which makes this next part critical: = = Friend, We had all expected that the Saturday one month out from our primary election would be filled with campaign rallies and door-to-door campaigning. But that was before the coronavirus pandemic created so much grief and turmoil. Nearly 30 million Americans lacked any health insurance whatsoever before the coronavirus pandemic. Now more are losing coverage, with 33 million jobless claims in the past 7 weeks and Georgia’s Governor Brian Kemp recommending cuts to a Medicaid program he has already refused to expand. Both of Georgia’s senators have disgraced our state with their self-interested actions after learning of the threat the coronavirus posed to the American public. Teresa has fought for justice in federal courts, governed one of America’s 25 best run cities as mayor, and drilled countless times as a public safety director. She is who we need to face David Perdue to flip this Senate seat and lead during this crisis. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = Thank you for your support — our work is far from over. —Team Tomlinson ****** ****** ****** ****** PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

Dear Friend Since I filed to run for Congress, I've been called a lot of names by small minded people who dismiss the power our movement. But this week, our opposition decided to not just go after me - but to go after you, my biggest supporters. After a powerful profile of my candidacy in the [Siuslaw News of Florence, Oregon](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.31m/TOXBZ1-zRy2_wCpEIMStVw/h1/t-2F7KvPXkwOiC8PgsV9PzX75GgIqri1Rsu7VStmVIeSVrqVkNG4HopkNNt-2BiRxaVL1MHLDknoKjht6rFmKb4npdqVqlZrWO-2FIRcQ9aonueit9wcb3u7ewcusiYDmgfxLNdtdcKz5-2Fsrb94t2W8aGOTuR-2FJ0R1FCTsTs3S-2Fg6-2BPt15mL04ULwCO5p8clTwras2k6kRS88QZNM-2B2VRyM3CT8Ik2yGfajruTnC9gPpX4rPAa6T-2BWbbsF-2BEt3kphyNR-2B02uZ2bVhHgHmDVQtE6x-2BsGtTSkeOIkBfJSlNVGVgZJy3QmclfJOpaWCXlIM9XqjMYlLJViSjYom9v-2BqfYOTBj7CZteiewDV9f8EHp96uP5-2Fg-3D/WeaF) that has been getting a lot of traction on social media, a local Defazio supporter contacted the paper with the claim that my campaign was financed by a "foreign national" in violation of the law. He alleged that my supporter - who has a Latinx name - is not a U.S. citizen, and sent a complaint the Federal Elections Commission (FEC), essentially asking the FEC to call ICE on my donor. It was a new low for Defazio's campaign, but it seems to be a theme. Another Defazio supporter is harassing one of our student volunteers on Facebook, demanding to know his citizenship status. This kind of targeted anti-immigrant bullying is on-brand for an incumbent who has [backed anti-immigrant legislation in Congress](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.31m/TOXBZ1-zRy2_wCpEIMStVw/h2/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCw-2B5zy2gCNWYyiIJai9ux8w3xy4B7Z2oqPBpvRvrI2uagCPVrG2SsGZlGMhTA5jkzi3suYva7agHjKT-2BmrId1kn0MR8KWsmtlyGL-2FOMnnaUGH0Jdcl73sgzYO8fK4Gplw3ZiS2jCb0KeSOkmPNHY2UsoM4gM4SevKi6GDxUG1X8TzFS-2FnT7PgpPnyjLe5PFa2fz93tilNfZOSJaUjorrM5p5emWofSesUu1zpb5IiAGYVTGwU5P21x8y8PkRy5wgVCScrOgIJmvjNjX-2FWT19Qj2/FlZC) for 30 years. I need your support tonight to fight back, and to make sure that we can activate every last voter in this district to take a stand with us before Election Day on May 19th.[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.31m/TOXBZ1-zRy2_wCpEIMStVw/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXMaId1G6xK-2Bc79BM2NZ7Dny-2B8r7QBOqjgWSFRrdCMmRxOh7KpkSdgufBwA5uHrhpwDt2aB-2BsfW1sDKaUPSri6MJYMuPwuJxMaXzZPFUH9-2FNOYTc-2Bx3asqhpa81kWE2B3ITsdotwgMW3sywWQNq-2BuzXBdKfBmjV1I2UtgStpou4y4ckhC7IfUpF2mbc6T5ezsFkuuo51kQaLM6WVokebICtjRcgCMHob7RkUpKlGE9Q1I8VyJAUb8KjqdC5Gj-2FzVt4L8RSLEgOoPP3-2BuIv9cQAUboHwBaayrIikP-2Fd5wc6T6U9f7r7lGvIHXTVCD2csH3xS/6Wm2)[Please donate $25, $50, $100, or more if you can. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.31m/TOXBZ1-zRy2_wCpEIMStVw/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXMLf19mcL6Qyn-2BaUMc5wxpStnTMPREqd2VHIW4ywgmg19mkHfTSrHdWteWVbY-2FnxzyeYlHgoyI4qfFbA7kwKDvuD0w-2Be6sfGvUj3BercUb-2F6O84KmOK7b-2BDiQkhQLn7CbaojFtA0cVbcDnKQ6SsT1njm5G2EP1uOHYLbqjFnQMajuMRAFQI7D6I3oIiOn-2FuEcMpw3DACaFhG-2BT5WzWx-2FIO4hESlmkVShc1MQ8bxWlDTmFuKcZYGX0heGb2r40TTCtYxY1BZStA6BpwvjCxB0ekKZRE0zAK4Z8-2BPHHqIPlJw6WBV2bNoMaWRnPL9ig1TOMb/78sT)

clean_body: | | Dear Friend Since I filed to run for Congress, I've been called a lot of names by small minded people who dismiss the power our movement. But this week, our opposition decided to not just go after me - but to go after you, my biggest supporters. After a powerful profile of my candidacy in the that has been getting a lot of traction on social media, a local Defazio supporter contacted the paper with the claim that my campaign was financed by a "foreign national" in violation of the law. He alleged that my supporter - who has a Latinx name - is not a U.S. citizen, and sent a complaint the Federal Elections Commission (FEC), essentially asking the FEC to call ICE on my donor. It was a new low for Defazio's campaign, but it seems to be a theme. Another Defazio supporter is harassing one of our student volunteers on Facebook, demanding to know his citizenship status. This kind of targeted anti-immigrant bullying is on-brand for an incumbent who has for 30 years. I need your support tonight to fight back, and to make sure that we can activate every last voter in this district to take a stand with us before Election Day on May 19th. We can replace a Democrat that supported Trump's anti-immigrant bill in Congress with a champion for racial justice and human rights. But it is going to take all of us, and this weekend is the crucial time to get the word out. We are falling short on our goals, and we must catch up this weekend if we want to do another round of text messages, increase our ad buys, and send our postcards. . Please join us and take a stand today. When Defazio's white men start shouting "show me your papers," and calling me a "clueless woman," I know that they are afraid that they might lose to a progressive, multi-racial coalition that is challenging their status quo. They may be scared of our movement, but we will never be afraid of their Republican tactics. Thank you for your support. Onward, Doyle | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . body:
Tomorrow's Mother's Day, and I'm giving MJ a card from the team!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900bf/7f51f7bc/4f9c796c/4ef15c09/82048194/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | _We know this can be a difficult holiday for some. If you 'd prefer not to receive emails about Mother's Day, [click here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900bf/7f51f7bc/4f9c796c/4ef15c08/82048194/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-mothersdayoptout") and we won't send you any more._ This Mother's Day is going to be a little different than in the past, Peter, but at least there will be plenty of family time! | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900bf/7f51f7bc/4f9c796c/4ef15c0f/82048194/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-mothersdaycard")
---
The kids and I are putting together a card for MJ -- and it would mean so much if we could get all her supporters to sign it and show they've got MJ's back all the way to November!

**[Will you add your name?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900bf/7f51f7bc/4f9c796c/4ef15c0f/82048194/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-mothersdaycard")**

\-- Brandon

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900bf/7f51f7bc/4f9c796c/4ef15c0e/82048194/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-mothersdaycard?refcode=email_20200509.1__1374__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900bf/7f51f7bc/4f9c796c/4ef15c0d/82048194/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1374&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900bf/7f51f7bc/4f9c796c/4ef15c0c/82048194/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

body:
Schumer and his cronies only need to flip FOUR seats out of 23. Make a 5OO% matched donation and defend the Republican Senate!
Friend, the situation we are facing is worse than I thought. Republicans are defending 23 seats, and Democrats only need FOUR seats to capture the Senate.
**
This is just a snapshot of what Republicans are facing: **
* **Arizona:** The far-left Democrat raised $11 million in the first 3 months of 2020 and **$19.7 million in the bank.**
* **North Carolina,** **Schumer 's Super PAC poured $25 million to defeat** President Trump and his Senate ally.
* **Colorado:** A must-win for Republicans, went from "toss-up" to **" tilts Democrat."**
* **Iowa:** The top Democrat Super PAC announced they are **spending an ADDITIONAL $13.1 million on ads** - that's on top of the $3 million they've already spent!

**We could lose the Senate if you don 't act right now. **[**Rush an immediate 5X MATCHED donation before midnight tonight!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_3u-835kCxUe-taI5J3JJ6bt22uV_BZqjCGLpcliqMROej6Lpaz-EA42eBCFs4YXfGhLpM7kgI2Y-VYY20nmC80KDzvKrqo0y6Aj_ZerVnXY0wfDY4KXokd-DTwgL9brBcyNrtxOqO3uqhMhdRhKp3B8JUjvYRU1npCKCMMVMmZCydZcVWE511TM8z75cCXzkFM1DxjNBc5yS0CrR3jfSdv0JB4FCBOTfDRuv306JRF9iqQ43p4rRdDtjLNnxV-2KX6W1LF55yUFdgVUjtC8uo61THZChFqAUIXL3jNQHgByyeXI2ZnYPlZ456QYzEzaW0UEhc7s0OboxPIRpxi4LAtyes-O8zGRkxbwVcMfp1FjhZvP5yCqOixaYodK7FvYsb_cMPc3rB1893LuXuZtTlSG8QJ2wQ0g9JZEJDbJDBbjLoWJvZmrhg==&c=AsGVRmlzG3P6XgARwShVcm35_XffCRtfZUhavhfsGt3byNk-PZPSwQ==&ch=PP6wlTOnh_zbNJCGKRbJzNWGVymokJjqm3UUfwEeg5HwSEZVQJOCVQ==)

subject: It's time to bring some Iowa common sense to Washington!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Iowans don't want failed policies like the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, or higher taxes to support the socialist wish list of Pelosi and AOC.
Friend --
Thank you for helping us reach our $10,000 fundraising goal we set for the first week of May! We couldn't have done this without your help.
This was extremely important due to the fact that Nancy Pelosi recently put in $2,000,000 from her House Majority PAC to protect her far left liberal ally, Abby Finkenauer. Friend,

name: Tina Smith
subject: I’m at my wit’s end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hey, this is a slightly longer email than I usually write, but I hope you will take the time to read it. It’s no secret that Republicans put the interests of the most powerful (usually their big-wig donors) above ordinary folks. I have seen it happen time and again in some of the most despicable ways. From rushing through extremist right-wing judges and threatening to gut our health care system, to Trump fumbling the federal response to this ongoing crisis and refusing to help those in need — the GOP agenda is _dangerous._ **Look, I got into politics to fight for the issues that matter most to everyday families, like access to quality, affordable health care, good-paying jobs, protecting the right to vote, and building an economy that works for everyone.** But it’s clear Republicans like Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and my opponent Jason Lewis have a very different set of values. They refuse to take these issues — and this pandemic — seriously. Trump dragged his feet on providing relief to American families because, evidently, late-night tweetstorms and chaotic evening briefings filled with misinformation were at the top of his to-do list. McConnell says states should go bankrupt rather than get further federal help through this crisis. **That’s just the tip of the iceberg.** My opponent made the dangerous decision to resume in-person campaign events and has called for Minnesota to prematurely reopen — ignoring health officials’ warnings and endangering the lives of our health care professionals, first responders, seniors, and countless others. I’m determined to keep Minnesota away from the GOP’s dangerous grasp. But if I’m honest, we have a very tough fight ahead of us. Republicans will do whatever it takes to flip Minnesota red and defeat me to hold onto their majority in Washington, so I’m asking for your help today: **If you’re financially able, please donate $10 or more to help us save Minnesota’s Senate seat. clean_body: | Hey, this is a slightly longer email than I usually write, but I hope you will take the time to read it. It’s no secret that Republicans put the interests of the most powerful (usually their big-wig donors) above ordinary folks. I have seen it happen time and again in some of the most despicable ways. From rushing through extremist right-wing judges and threatening to gut our health care system, to Trump fumbling the federal response to this ongoing crisis and refusing to help those in need — the GOP agenda is dangerous. Look, I got into politics to fight for the issues that matter most to everyday families, like access to quality, affordable health care, good-paying jobs, protecting the right to vote, and building an economy that works for everyone. But it’s clear Republicans like Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and my opponent Jason Lewis have a very different set of values. They refuse to take these issues — and this pandemic — seriously. Trump dragged his feet on providing relief to American families because, evidently, late-night tweetstorms and chaotic evening briefings filled with misinformation were at the top of his to-do list. McConnell says states should go bankrupt rather than get further federal help through this crisis. That’s just the tip of the iceberg. My opponent made the dangerous decision to resume in-person campaign events and has called for Minnesota to prematurely reopen — ignoring health officials’ warnings and endangering the lives of our health care professionals, first responders, seniors, and countless others. I’m determined to keep Minnesota away from the GOP’s dangerous grasp. But if I’m honest, we have a very tough fight ahead of us. Republicans will do whatever it takes to flip Minnesota red and defeat me to hold onto their majority in Washington, so I’m asking for your help today: If you’re financially able, please donate $10 or more to help us save Minnesota’s Senate seat. We must ensure our state continues to elect responsible leaders who will take this pandemic seriously — not play partisan games. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m at my wit’s end when it comes to Trump and his administration dragging their feet on giving folks the support they need. I’m even more fed up when they choose to bail out big corporations and their wealthy friends — on the backs of ordinary folks. We can’t let them and their dangerous agenda take hold in Minnesota or anywhere else for that matter. With your help, we can win re-election, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put power back in the hands of the people. Thanks for reading. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
We’re planning on launching a powerful, new ad on TV next week to share our progressive message and invite people to join the movement to defeat Mitch McConnell.
#
We want to update you on something exciting we’ve been working on.
**We’re planning on launching a powerful new ad next week to share our progressive message and invite people to join the movement to defeat Mitch McConnell. **
Launching an ad like this takes a lot of work and resources. Our finance team said that the amount of money we raise these next couple days will largely determine how long we can run our ads and how many people we can reach.
**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can so we can fund our new TV ad campaign launch next week? Every extra dollar we raise will enable us to spend bigger and reach more people with our message.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17434651/194134882/1004788534?refcode=em20200509&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWIwMTBlOS0xZDkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpzRjtzxWWPmpiwoGFT3Ku-jwmP5DD6RegJ2c7cx7RU=)**
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17434652/194134883/1004788534?refcode=em20200509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWIwMTBlOS0xZDkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpzRjtzxWWPmpiwoGFT3Ku-jwmP5DD6RegJ2c7cx7RU=)**
We have less than 50 days left until the primary and we’re racing to reach as many voters as possible.
So far our grassroots strategy is paying off — we’re building a diverse movement that’s bringing together folks from rural areas, folks from cities, folks who’ve never voted before, and folks who’ve been waiting for a progressive candidate like Charles.
**But to be honest with you, we know there’s still a big number of people we haven’t reached yet.** A vast number of Kentuckians agree with our campaign’s values and priorities — but they don’t know yet that Charles is the only candidate running with this message. The best way to reach these voters is to run a big video ads campaign so more people can learn about our progressive movement.
**[Will you help us raise the funds we need to run an ambitious video ads campaign? If we want to defeat Mitch in November, we need to grow our movement and spread our progressive message to every corner of Kentucky.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17434653/194134884/1004788534?refcode=em20200509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWIwMTBlOS0xZDkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpzRjtzxWWPmpiwoGFT3Ku-jwmP5DD6RegJ2c7cx7RU=)**

Team Booker

name: John Jackson
subject: FWD: Only 2,457 Slots Left!
body:
Friend,
Since Senator Cornyn last reached out to you to let you know there were 2,457 slots left on our Red Texas Defenders team, that number has dwindled down to only _**236**_! Thousands of Texans have decided that they're in that they're committed to seeing Texas come out RED again come November. Friend, I want you to be a part of this team. But it's not just me who wants you to join it's also the senator. He has asked for you by name. That's why we went ahead and created you a personalized link so that when you sign up, I can immediately send over Senator Cornyn a text to let him know that you joined the Red Texas Defenders. Your link is here >>> **[Friend.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018q4Y8BtjRu4hHRmVZR2et6_-lMPWsoknTGFeadyPMT1qHuPAR6xcarttb-o3oVi2OPUNewfNC4N0KyJfYKdliEjLR9YbJorHn10juO0gejBBN5f5KH3658xEkf0MyGOsKT01iSbvFMFQrtKKjJ0rcs1iEGq3q1ojMtdkkHzJLaVRlzpms9QGsNn3mFfksy_v6bVPmvsvCgS7uP7RwdSVQSIRPGm5m3P_tHMVWsyO_NIiqeBlPj5APAboSrhAgQ7WS8BGlB3xHarY7L85tlQxI5Yy9cs3oha45rNlU50oNmnSchwUx2wr_esubNn5I31tIDqx7bXQUSkzHdEjhedsYBOnxwx9DiwFGKk3XjtaIx6uYFK1Ixxonw==&c=-ZjXl5ykb1xVo6URy5t4KyHMyT4osfFXcxt9ILktXSQwlsGDhQGd9w==&ch=1zbEaaH1rHqW9xx-25mpx969tNKB_w0UTdGUhY-GfG6hb4eug2pcog==)** **[This is the last chance for you to join the team. John Jackson Campaign Manager \----------Forwarded Message Below------- Friend, The new Red Texas Defender team that we have instituted has kicked off with a bang. I'm not at all surprised by the number of Texans who have decided to join this select group. But one thing that does surprise me was not seeing your name on the list. I really thought this team would appeal to you. A team of people who want to keep Texas red and are committed to defending our conservative values. [ **CHANGE YOUR STATUS** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018q4Y8BtjRu4hHRmVZR2et6_-lMPWsoknTGFeadyPMT1qHuPAR6xcarttb-o3oVi2OPUNewfNC4N0KyJfYKdliEjLR9YbJorHn10juO0gejBBN5f5KH3658xEkf0MyGOsKT01iSbvFMFQrtKKjJ0rcs1iEGq3q1ojMtdkkHzJLaVRlzpms9QGsNn3mFfksy_v6bVPmvsvCgS7uP7RwdSVQSIRPGm5m3P_tHMVWsyO_NIiqeBlPj5APAboSrhAgQ7WS8BGlB3xHarY7L85tlQxI5Yy9cs3oha45rNlU50oNmnSchwUx2wr_esubNn5I31tIDqx7bXQUSkzHdEjhedsYBOnxwx9DiwFGKk3XjtaIx7XzyQOPX962g==&c=-ZjXl5ykb1xVo6URy5t4KyHMyT4osfFXcxt9ILktXSQwlsGDhQGd9w==&ch=1zbEaaH1rHqW9xx-25mpx969tNKB_w0UTdGUhY-GfG6hb4eug2pcog==) When my team and I crafted this strategic group, we really thought that you would want to be a part, but I guess I was mistaken. This is a team of people I WILL turn to. I have a team of people I CAN trust. And be not mistaken you're one of those. Friend, maybe you just overlooked my last email, and if so, that is fine, because we currently have 2,457 slots left for you to join the Red Texas Defender's group. **[There's a slot with your name on it, Friend.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018q4Y8BtjRu4hHRmVZR2et6_-lMPWsoknTGFeadyPMT1qHuPAR6xcarttb-o3oVi2OPUNewfNC4N0KyJfYKdliEjLR9YbJorHn10juO0gejBBN5f5KH3658xEkf0MyGOsKT01iSbvFMFQrtKKjJ0rcs1iEGq3q1ojMtdkkHzJLaVRlzpms9QGsNn3mFfksy_v6bVPmvsvCgS7uP7RwdSVQSIRPGm5m3P_tHMVWsyO_NIiqeBlPj5APAboSrhAgQ7WS8BGlB3xHarY7L85tlQxI5Yy9cs3oha45rNlU50oNmnSchwUx2wr_esubNn5I31tIDqx7bXQUSkzHdEjhedsYBOnxwx9DiwFGKk3XjtaIx5Xp7swARGAkQ==&c=-ZjXl5ykb1xVo6URy5t4KyHMyT4osfFXcxt9ILktXSQwlsGDhQGd9w==&ch=1zbEaaH1rHqW9xx-25mpx969tNKB_w0UTdGUhY-GfG6hb4eug2pcog==)** **Become a Red Texas Defender Now** **Only 2,457 slots left!** Status: **PENDING** [ **TIME IS RUNNING OUT** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018q4Y8BtjRu4hHRmVZR2et6_-lMPWsoknTGFeadyPMT1qHuPAR6xcarttb-o3oVi2OPUNewfNC4N0KyJfYKdliEjLR9YbJorHn10juO0gejBBN5f5KH3658xEkf0MyGOsKT01iSbvFMFQrtKKjJ0rcs1iEGq3q1ojMtdkkHzJLaVRlzpms9QGsNn3mFfksy_v6bVPmvsvCgS7uP7RwdSVQSIRPGm5m3P_tHMVWsyO_NIiqeBlPj5APAboSrhAgQ7WS8BGlB3xHarY7L85tlQxI5Yy9cs3oha45rNlU50oNmnSchwUx2wr_esubNn5I31tIDqx7bXQUSkzHdEjhedsYBOnxwx9DiwFGKk3XjtaIx6LQ-Pr6OT39Q==&c=-ZjXl5ykb1xVo6URy5t4KyHMyT4osfFXcxt9ILktXSQwlsGDhQGd9w==&ch=1zbEaaH1rHqW9xx-25mpx969tNKB_w0UTdGUhY-GfG6hb4eug2pcog==) I'm anxiously awaiting your membership status changing from Not Yet Joined, to, Member! John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018q4Y8BtjRu4hHRmVZR2et6_-lMPWsoknTGFeadyPMT1qHuPAR6xcamkF_T1qGW3yIxF-xv0ZEELhUbNhfXnYOEfAODPNbeMEfggRLCUn6UhiNS3fWMgx2ejCVlVf2Zlyba-Lv8F5DXxSvURHZLR_KkWXMEygrv5v4uW_aB0xQBo=&c=-ZjXl5ykb1xVo6URy5t4KyHMyT4osfFXcxt9ILktXSQwlsGDhQGd9w==&ch=1zbEaaH1rHqW9xx-25mpx969tNKB_w0UTdGUhY-GfG6hb4eug2pcog==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018q4Y8BtjRu4hHRmVZR2et6_-lMPWsoknTGFeadyPMT1qHuPAR6xcaqCVvibM7moUluShmBKDy2Jyjrd3MFRQ5ablI9omN6npZnzxBS6RUoI6E9j8ekDxj1bpMkvvnJyNTrXHNMv7b9oastTrjbBqxHSlOjC6204_&c=-ZjXl5ykb1xVo6URy5t4KyHMyT4osfFXcxt9ILktXSQwlsGDhQGd9w==&ch=1zbEaaH1rHqW9xx-25mpx969tNKB_w0UTdGUhY-GfG6hb4eug2pcog==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018q4Y8BtjRu4hHRmVZR2et6_-lMPWsoknTGFeadyPMT1qHuPAR6xcamkF_T1qGW3y8EMAsl7xynjHDZOVEgphjn8MzQg6_Y88VW7MMU__A1DoRZoeaU1x5u9hxKCjuCI8UH36zmv6JgSGPbxp1z5cHfsgMQkF93bCA30gbJFOM4wRqcv9HM9Ckg==&c=-ZjXl5ykb1xVo6URy5t4KyHMyT4osfFXcxt9ILktXSQwlsGDhQGd9w==&ch=1zbEaaH1rHqW9xx-25mpx969tNKB_w0UTdGUhY-GfG6hb4eug2pcog==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018q4Y8BtjRu4hHRmVZR2et6_-lMPWsoknTGFeadyPMT1qHuPAR6xcagACZDqgFVdSkh7zB_kiFMJlTkw57acb3ML3NCn0l2zceBtBAIa6WLBV0VEvSrTl8ouhC7pskvoOicnWMv41Gwf3tcACwNX0UfoCdBhNK8ul5UMwSnyKj3sFzRPq-9JCZ5XxuMJ_0OQ86qN9sGs8kwsAHFD7H80ysTfesbj_31gW7cDx58RF_FyzNQzFKS38NlAF3jr8xsaoYn7-uEardhPuDiPlTtHOC3eiprUZSyPyOjnd0fL3mzHsLs6MVfxP3g==&c=-ZjXl5ykb1xVo6URy5t4KyHMyT4osfFXcxt9ILktXSQwlsGDhQGd9w==&ch=1zbEaaH1rHqW9xx-25mpx969tNKB_w0UTdGUhY-GfG6hb4eug2pcog==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

subject: 3 things I need you to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Now more than ever, we need clear-eyed, moral leadership in Washington, and that's why I'm running for U.S. Senate.
| | |
---
Friend, there are three things I need you to know about this race:
* Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats CAN take back the Senate, and it could all come down to Georgia.
* My wealthy Republican opponent is spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat - and the GOP has named me a top target.
* Our campaign is fueled by grassroots donations, but we still need to raise $10,968 by midnight to stay on track to hit our monthly goal.

I'm running for Senate to flip Georgia blue and end Mitch McConnell's majority once and for all - but I can't win without you, friend. Please, with so much on the line in this election, **can you give $5 or more now to help us win in Georgia and take back the Senate? **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk209-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: Senator Cory Gardner
subject: Schumer's plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
I'm reaching out to folks like you today because I wanted to check in and give a quick update on the state of the 2020 Elections and where we stand with protecting the Senate Republican Majority.
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._

body:

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/8dhHm7_GHMbbaRlPvGxLBehU6zguBW3i4mmxYAQ5-0s=/UzqwJbYES1Y9-jv3ziAtwZg1i6MRlaYrx5HtPFe_OFM=?code=GS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_050720_ACAJA_A%26amount%3D50)

[**SIGN ON to help Greg _protect and champion_ the Affordable Care Act in Congress »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8dhHm7_GHMbbaRlPvGxLBehU6zguBW3i4mmxYAQ5-0s=/UzqwJbYES1Y9-jv3ziAtwZg1i6MRlaYrx5HtPFe_OFM=?code=GS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_050720_ACAJA_A%26amount%3D50)

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Join me for a Virtual Town Hall on Housing Insecurity and Homelessness During the time of COVID-19
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hbJ7lvVJVMzFBMpymnKYo3kJQHWFx6jtZsWu5VgSvjw=/EBFijP_NtB_PWC4_wQj0R33K6LwxhVsIdrVpM-7vTDw=)

Peter,

I want to invite you to our next Virtual Town Hall about how COVID-19 has impacted those who are housing insecure or experiencing homelessness. I will be joined by Áine Duggan and Dan Tietz. Our discussion will focus on the obstacles that COVID-19 has created for those experiencing homelessness, the initiatives that have worked well in helping people right now, and the best way for our community to help. Please forward this opportunity to those in your network who would be interested in this topic and submit questions you have for us on our registration form.

Adem Bunkeddeko for Congress Virtual Town Hall with
Áine Duggan & Dan Tietz
Discussion of the impact of COVID-19 on
those experiencing homelessness

Tuesday, May 12, 2020
6:30-7:30PM EST
Zoom conferencing information will be shared with registered participants.

******[CLICK HERE TO RSVP](https://act.myngp.com/el/hbJ7lvVJVMzFBMpymnKYo3kJQHWFx6jtZsWu5VgSvjw=/aO0bJyLnf0VKKkmvsTproVkV8iALRSxjaH_4lZ-6_zw=)******

Áine Duggan is the President and CEO of The Partnership for the Homeless. The primary focus of The Partnership is preventing homelessness with eviction prevention; creating stability through mental health and emotional well-being interventions and disrupting generational homelessness by ensuring children in shelters, or at risk of homelessness, have continuous access to school.

Dan Tietz is the Temporary Receiver/Chief Executive Officer for Childrens Community Services, Inc. (CCS), one of New York City's largest providers of emergency shelter and services to families and individuals experiencing homelessness. CCS serves approximately 1,300 families with minor children. In the near term, the Department of Homeless Services has expanded CCS's portfolio given the City's great need for COVID-19 quarantine and isolation shelter services.

I hope you will join us and thank you for your support.

Best,
Adem

* * *

******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/hbJ7lvVJVMzFBMpymnKYo3kJQHWFx6jtZsWu5VgSvjw=/4dTb5hJZ_Stbc2J8i3vEK8iNxPXRqn3KOwaVCZgWDII=)******

******[BECOME A VOLUNTEER](https://act.myngp.com/el/hbJ7lvVJVMzFBMpymnKYo3kJQHWFx6jtZsWu5VgSvjw=/7ocQjVl5l_bylT_XmjCvgEjvW70Lh26VLxQJE9PjcHk=)******

******[VISIT OUR WEBSITE](https://act.myngp.com/el/hbJ7lvVJVMzFBMpymnKYo3kJQHWFx6jtZsWu5VgSvjw=/J9sOcd1xJcyddO1kj2L8lNsQDeMLQ6lwSE2Fi5ADdZk=)******

* * *

Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
Trump Joins World War II veterans at V-E Day ceremony | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e0f49b352&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump Joins World War II Veterans at V-E Day Ceremony](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d296b922d0&e=3ee4985eea)
-FOX 5 DC
Earlier today, President Trump participated in a wreath-laying ceremony at the World War II Memorial in Washington, D.C., commemorating the 75th anniversary of Victory in Europe Day. The President was joined by a small group of World War II veterans, each of whom he greeted while maintaining social distance, Kevin Freking reports.

**🎬**** WATCH:** [“America’s spirit will always win.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f9156b4b2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Collapse of Michael Flynn Case is Latest Sign ‘RussiaGate’ Was a Complete Fraud**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99d0adcad9&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“With the Justice Department moving to drop charges against Gen. Mike Flynn, pretty much the entire ‘RussiaGate’ investigation stands exposed as a fraud,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “Lefties are already claiming that Attorney General William Barr is simply playing politics, but the facts say otherwise.”

**MORE:** [“Obama Defense official Evelyn Farkas admitted she lied on MSNBC” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81cd47da97&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Five Republican Governors: Our States Stayed Open in the Covid-19 Pandemic. Here’s Why Our Approach Worked.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4300507d90&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“The diversity of the 50 states is what makes our nation’s economy great, and each state’s response to the novel coronavirus is as diverse as the pandemic’s impact on each of us,” Governors Mark Gordon (R-WY), Pete Ricketts (R-NE), Asa Hutchinson (R-AR), Kim Reynolds (R-IA), and Mike Parson (R-MO) write. “Our approach has created a model for success that can be applied throughout the country.”

**🇺🇸****President Trump:** [“We’re opening up our country again”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d219b8727b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Melania Reflects On Anniversary Of ‘Be Best’ Launch And The ‘Major’ Accomplishments Over Last Two Years**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=84f1cbcbc3&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Caller_
First Lady Melania Trump’s signature “Be Best” campaign celebrated its two-year anniversary this week, Katie Jerkovich reports. “It remains our generation’s moral imperative to take responsibility and help our children manage the many issues they are facing today, including encouraging positive social, emotional, and physical habits,” the First Lady said.

**🎬****WATCH:** [Two years of Be Best!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=51235823db&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**A Victory for Campus Justice**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f708e4cf6&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Barring courtroom shenanigans or noncompliance on the part of universities, students will soon benefit from a considerably fairer system of campus justice,” Robert Shibley writes. With updated rules from the Department of Education, “institutions will finally have to guarantee due process for students caught up in campus kangaroo courts.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3fd214016c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1efd3127a6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5cf26620c1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Christy Smith
subject: Crossing the finish line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

When I first decided to run for Congress, I certainly never could have imagined the position we would be in now.

In fact, I never expected to run for Congress -- I started with my daughters' school board because I saw an opportunity to bring about change where it was needed.

**And that's what I see now more than ever. We need and deserve a leader who will work hard to get the solutions we need to some of our biggest problems.**

My opponent doesn't even have the guts to stand up to Donald Trump when he says something ridiculous -- whether it's suggesting people drink cleaning products to stay safe from COVID or downplaying the severity of this crisis.**I most certainly do.**

But right now, we're in jeopardy of falling short of our fundraising goals and if we do, we won't be able to fight for the change we need. Instead, we'll have another enabler of Trump's divisive politics.

**[The choice is clear in who we need in Congress -- I promise to be a leader with strong convictions and a big heart. Republican special interests are increasing their spending, and I need your help now to make sure we win in just a few days. Can you chip in now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06ba/2927610523/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06bb/2927610523/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06b4/2927610523/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06b5/2927610523/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06b6/2927610523/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06b7/2927610523/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06ba/2927610523/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non")
These next few days are so important to our race. Under normal circumstances, I would be out knocking on doors all across the district -- but instead, I'll be making phone calls and sending texts (like so many of our incredible volunteers!).

This race is incredibly close -- no one can predict how it will end up.**But what I know is this -- no one is working harder than us to make sure we win this seat and have the right representative in Congress.**

**[Help us cross the finish line -- pitch in $5 or whatever you can today to make it happen.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06ba/2927610523/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non")**

Thanks so much, Peter. I'm so lucky to have you on my team.

\-- Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbef/29776869/a65f9c2/569f06ba/2927610523/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfb25lbWlsbGlvbjEyX25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_onemillion12_non")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

I'm so lucky to have you on my team. \-- Christy "" The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win. | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

body:
Explore cultural offerings in 12 cities across the U.S.

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=82b892aaaa584acab26ed934ed98d80d&_e=AYYl2t9tjak5ql2xW3_mEsPw75_9bcIYsF28HBkWtuSKvR3mLtBrs6A5yKYu4mYXemiucReTrz6GQ7XXRmB8aoCa4LGDvNSZfrggtXzpUXJBzCyCNvRRSGn2B07cmtTL-YDm9tuUt251HgctX88Pdi0UvKqnd187ePpNHYwp5xvdCU8scpRhIBnPpexbh2SqY4U29QAgLP0C4IJZtbvirZQ3oN3s_RP_7pf8M14IdoqkcKyrmpA4P3ooyUxa2j_1a7yLUxAyvT6i-Nmjr06LRfb2uyQOFdRTYGbR6C1WSH_5DlrhrDw6Sc0QLqJWnbdb) Friend, While we're staying home, we have a unique opportunity to access the world digitally -- in ways we might not otherwise. clean_body: Explore cultural offerings in 12 cities across the U.S. | You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you! Friend, While we're staying home, we have a unique opportunity to access the world digitally -- in ways we might not otherwise. This weekend, you can check out opera from Austin or join a dance class in Denver. View public art in Los Angeles and explore a children's museum in Baltimore with your kids. They're part of a virtual, cultural road trip featuring interactive classes, performances, and online tours from institutions in the Bloomberg Philanthropies Arts Innovation and Management program. Here's where you can go in our 12-city, two-part journey: There's plenty to enjoy, from venues and arts institutions all across the country. Check out all the offerings in our virtual cultural road trip: Part 1: Part 2: Thanks, Bloomberg Philanthropies | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- . Bloomberg Philanthropies All content © 2020. All rights reserved.

name: Team LaHood
subject: Ending our dependence on China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Darin has been selected to help end America’s dependence on China and to hold their leaders accountable for their role in the coronavirus pandemic. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=cd8f89042f7d405490845a072d33a1c9&_e=WWQOz7ph3LswOhjSaFJmjtveV6WBORx2mmAo8OyosBHmOZr4I6BR2b35msZHChuLsZrGcewBQ7s6-nKqn6aaSgyfT7tMNoD1PoIxCGrXhwB0s8XXBU_gcJDD2FnQxCeUVo19-PoWEXv47pJhOC6xhGtPYzcTnrRPPYAGNk0a0LAngunc4rTwKlf_f_bcMLQt6QT9Y2BBEqG11C2skkrENUYRP0JtPw3fXrq6Yekn4hZshNh4MPKKIgzprULa53TSmxBgv_TJGC4eoz7IPpnNn_2ELzLjmTDqXwJ08rlFWP9OctueJUy1IKEPCmCGAvfuCYJPMc_sxAP-VaXGWSvoz3cjsKeaRsbk0ONqQR7bKfJdKXKZMRDP0iodbZ8AaczpuQmHyxa40HQ1ipigWWunB80LB7yIdO_fqYIew4Ktja0wLKo4muD80HRWcySvwmf5cfmVSxpxRbvHTQmUmQ3ODUyajlCHYatfF0q4cutpOzM%3D) | |
---
Friend,

For weeks, Darin has joined President Trump, along with fellow Republicans in pressuring Democratic leaders in Washington to hold the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) liable for its deadly coverup in the aftermath of the COVID-19 outbreak.

_**That effort is officially underway, and Darin is helping lead it as a member of the Republican-led China Task Force.** _
[ **STAND WITH DARIN AGAINST THE CHINESE COMMUNIST PARTY** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=cd8f89042f7d405490845a072d33a1c9&_e=WWQOz7ph3LswOhjSaFJmjtveV6WBORx2mmAo8OyosBHmOZr4I6BR2b35msZHChuLsZrGcewBQ7s6-nKqn6aaSgyfT7tMNoD1PoIxCGrXhwB0s8XXBU_gcJDD2FnQxCeUVo19-PoWEXv47pJhOC6xhGtPYzcTnrRPPYAGNk0a0LAngunc4rTwKlf_f_bcMLQt6QT9Y2BBEqG11C2skkrENUYRP0JtPw3fXrq6Yekn4hZshNh4MPKKIgzprULa53TSmxBgv_TJGC4eoz7IPpnNn0GkpdWqWOCVUD2_eVIEzqg5c3j3uTOZf1YzushT84iWstPk6cKvQGNL5NFf0uuTxAL9nIROUJe0mNmbVd_ZgAteRP162Zi_np_ojJ0hHXX4_ae62uT5KvxEEJW8qWercRlGsUuk5yyfm5MK1LtzeBFrfQ8xYmTFbro7cAMVaiOGmb9fyCvIqOgPyA-pPrhfh-AsWS9-19MzUDsyrJ5-v54%3D)
President Trump, Darin, and his colleagues are focused on holding China accountable for silencing whistleblowers and hiding the truth about the virus, robbing the world of the chance to prepare for COVID-19.

But the Task Force is focused on much more than just China’s deceitful and unacceptable response to coronavirus.

_**It’s about ending America’s dependence on China and making sure that America is in a position to come back stronger than ever when this is all over.**_
[ **STAND WITH DARIN. END AMERICA’S DEPENDENCE ON CHINA** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=cd8f89042f7d405490845a072d33a1c9&_e=WWQOz7ph3LswOhjSaFJmjtveV6WBORx2mmAo8OyosBHmOZr4I6BR2b35msZHChuLsZrGcewBQ7s6-nKqn6aaSgyfT7tMNoD1PoIxCGrXhwB0s8XXBU_gcJDD2FnQxCeUVo19-PoWEXv47pJhOC6xhGtPYzcTnrRPPYAGNk0a0LAngunc4rTwKlf_f_bcMLQt6QT9Y2BBEqG11C2skkrENUYRP0JtPw3fXrq6Yekn4hZshNh4MPKKIgzprULa53TSmxBgv_TJGC4eoz7IPpnNn-hSZ4JSWFQ345QYsoKflDzrHpifFXlL5fFBk1iOvA7GAsOOeWfFQbDXinTWxYKBxZKelMJUaxuuTosrK60dTBxNGgle6QYsrwvp9vKSpKSuJgkw3C1SAR2C1EQya-GvxrliJRKEI7MjH0M4iKWA8LVvSMYz1zLcMoP4EK7_AbAfL8pOkbsCp2vJOFRTcRSXivot2t30DvhbCH7nh6GCCsA%3D)
As a member of the China Task Force, Darin will be responsible for promoting policies on trade and the economy with one goal in mind – **keeping America a strong and independent nation. **
_**“I look forward to working with my Republican colleagues to promote policy solutions that advance the United States’ trade interests, strengthen national security, and ensure that China is held accountable for their failings to combat COVID—19.” **_
**\- Darin LaHood**
[ **STAND WITH DARIN. END AMERICA’S DEPENDENCE ON CHINA** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=cd8f89042f7d405490845a072d33a1c9&_e=WWQOz7ph3LswOhjSaFJmjtveV6WBORx2mmAo8OyosBHmOZr4I6BR2b35msZHChuLsZrGcewBQ7s6-nKqn6aaSgyfT7tMNoD1PoIxCGrXhwB0s8XXBU_gcJDD2FnQxCeUVo19-PoWEXv47pJhOC6xhGtPYzcTnrRPPYAGNk0a0LAngunc4rTwKlf_f_bcMLQt6QT9Y2BBEqG11C2skkrENUYRP0JtPw3fXrq6Yekn4hZshNh4MPKKIgzprULa53TSmxBgv_TJGC4eoz7IPpnNn3V1uLHiS8mJ2igF_4n8fwedTjjfbW9B08P-npix_D7oWqclpDuKSzdhPF0QCfmSVvRLq1qpffSFakiYERlsgo5a0yQ5yZ7nSvobyvUVSgcUBZIbmoYaVMwqVpdppNibbNKCosJXebNg_dLhC4dxMdHOaZuHNY7R2e5WBkYKsDv-VBHsy98bwy5P9hlp1bb1RA0dr0Wm80qQGPjNEirsQv4%3D)
As Darin and his colleagues uncover more about the CCP’s efforts to hide the truth about the virus, we will be sure to keep you informed every step of the way.

Thank you for standing with Darin.
Team LaHood

---
| |
---

| P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_s=cd8f89042f7d405490845a072d33a1c9&_t=7VmKzZBfCOAj63O98lFbmQeltKPFg_OHVOUWvrE7fFrYvKU8_B2whLUzVl3CddTEiaqqtQ6rUxBu8Jmy8T1GdlGVf2-6ad8coTSbF0KWw6-ZD69EHrinTlA2A_BmDrK3MLibfIY7_YUyBKI5xGOeMC2BsOEfA9J1mtObTAKNvPI%3D) |

**GENERAL FLYNN: CLEARED**
Friend,

**Congratulations to General Michael Flynn - this was a BIG win for Justice in the USA.**

As long as we keep fighting to DRAIN THE SWAMP of corrupt Washington Bureaucrats, I do believe there is MUCH more to come. Dirty Cops and Crooked Politicians do not go well together. _We need to get the bad people out of our government, and we need to do it fast._

The nasty Swamp Creatures have proven there's no line they won't cross to take down me and my administration, which is why I want to make a bold statement.

With your help, I want to let them know that as long as I am their President, these bogus WITCH HUNTS and deceitful actions will no longer be tolerated.

| | Friends, We are celebrating another holiday during self isolation, but I still plan to make the most of it and honor and thank the woman who made me who I am. My mother Pat has been my greatest source of strength throughout my entire life -- from growing up in Central New York, to my time serving in the Navy, and now in my campaign for Congress. I'm so grateful for her love and support throughout my life. Tomorrow I will be taking some time to thank my mother for everything she has done for me and our family throughout our lives. Whether you've been lucky enough to have a mom like mine or if you had someone else in your life that acted as a motherly figure -- take some time to thank them tomorrow. Give them a call or chat on FaceTime -- trust me, they will love it. During these uncertain times, it is so important to remember to take care of each other and share your gratitude and love with the world. Thanks,
Francis
---

If you 'd prefer not to receive emails about Mother's Day, [click here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890087/7f51f7bc/4f910c66/4ef15c7f/2847182713/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-mothersdayoptout") and we won't send you any more._ Peter -- Still need a Mother's Day gift? Why not give the badass mom in your life the gift of sending a fearless woman to the Senate? **You can even honor her directly by making a donation in her name!** **[DONATE NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890087/7f51f7bc/4f910c66/4ef15c7e/2847182713/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-mothersday2020?refcode=email_20200509.2nd__1397__&amount=10")** Let's keep it real: Protecting health care, passing gun safety legislation, and defending our planet for generations to come is more meaningful and lasting than flowers, right? name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: Your Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ad/53d9897e/54ed0de0/1c8871a4/2212449538/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

All of us on Team Warner hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy. Our team is committed to sending weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate. He's committed to making sure that every Virginian is cared for through this challenging time.

**Here 's just some of what Mark is working on this week: **
* On Wednesday, Mark and Rep. Suzan DelBene introduced a **[bicameral bill to modernize unemployment benefits](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ad/53d9897e/54ed0de0/1c8871a2/2212449538/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-delbene-propose-federal-funds-to-states-to-modernize-unemployment-benefits-technology/")** , establishing an emergency portable benefit fund for states. Mark has been sounding the alarm about gig economy workers, independent contractors, and folks who are self-employed falling through the cracks in our social safety net for years, and this bill would increase access to critical benefits for these workers and help our employment system catch up to the rapidly shifting nature of work.

* This week, Mark and 15 of his Senate colleagues called on the Department of Justice to make a plan for decisive federal action to address the **[rise in discrimination and hate crimes against Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) individuals](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ad/53d9897e/54ed0de0/1c8871a0/2212449538/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.nbc12.com/2020/05/04/sen-warner-calls-justice-dept-address-coronavirus-related-hate-crimes/")** during the coronavirus pandemic.

* Mark called on the Department of Veterans Affairs to participate in a nationwide coronavirus response plan by **[ramping up COVID-19 testing at facilities across the country.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ad/53d9897e/54ed0de0/1c8871ae/2212449538/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-urges-va-to-develop-cohesive-covid-19-testing-strategy/")**

* Mark joined 14 of his Senate colleagues to call for **[expanded access to accurate information about the coronavirus pandemic](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ad/53d9897e/54ed0de0/1c8871ac/2212449538/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/496438-senate-dems-call-for-administration-to-increase-access-to-coronavirus")** for Limited English Proficiency (LEP) and disabled communities. It's critical that vital federal relief programs are accessible to everyone who needs them.

* Mark and 8 of his colleagues in the Senate urged President Trump to expand use of the Defense Production Act (DPA) to dramatically **[increase production of personal protective equipment (PPE) and coronavirus testing materials](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ad/53d9897e/54ed0de0/1c8871aa/2212449538/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wvva.com/2020/05/07/va-senator-mark-warner-and-8-other-senators-urge-trump-to-immediately-use-dpa-to-manufacture-ppe-and-covid-19-testing-supplies/")** to address shortages nationwide.

* Mark and Sen. Tim Kaine both called for **[funding for state and local government budgets](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ad/53d9897e/54ed0de0/1c8871a9/2212449538/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.starexponent.com/news/senators-push-aid-for-virginia-and-localities-individuals-in-next-relief-package/article_27ff4ff8-11e7-5cc3-afa2-8ceb2a80cafe.html")** so states like Virginia can avoid laying off essential workers and emergency personnel.

As our country continues to grapple with this pandemic, Mark will keep fighting to get the best deal for Virginians and all Americans. We can all do our part by observing physical distancing guidelines from public health officials and staying home if possible.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner
|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

Our team is committed to sending weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate. He's committed to making sure that every Virginian is cared for through this challenging time. Here 's just some of what Mark is working on this week: On Wednesday, Mark and Rep. Suzan DelBene introduced a "" , establishing an emergency portable benefit fund for states. Mark has been sounding the alarm about gig economy workers, independent contractors, and folks who are self-employed falling through the cracks in our social safety net for years, and this bill would increase access to critical benefits for these workers and help our employment system catch up to the rapidly shifting nature of work. This week, Mark and 15 of his Senate colleagues called on the Department of Justice to make a plan for decisive federal action to address the "" during the coronavirus pandemic. Mark called on the Department of Veterans Affairs to participate in a nationwide coronavirus response plan by "" Mark joined 14 of his Senate colleagues to call for "" for Limited English Proficiency (LEP) and disabled communities. It's critical that vital federal relief programs are accessible to everyone who needs them. Mark and 8 of his colleagues in the Senate urged President Trump to expand use of the Defense Production Act (DPA) to dramatically "" to address shortages nationwide. Mark and Sen. Tim Kaine both called for "" so states like Virginia can avoid laying off essential workers and emergency personnel. As our country continues to grapple with this pandemic, Mark will keep fighting to get the best deal for Virginians and all Americans. We can all do our part by observing physical distancing guidelines from public health officials and staying home if possible. Thank you for your support. -- Team Warner | "" Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Mike Franken
subject: The Register endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Earning The Des Moines Register's endorsement is an especially proud moment for the campaign, because as their motto says, "Real perspective, brought to you by real Iowans," I feel like my prior servi
|
---

| | Earning _The Des Moines Register '_s endorsement is an especially proud moment for this campaign, because they bring, as their motto says, "Real perspective, brought to you by real Iowans." I feel like my prior service to this nation is now moving into the next chapter -- service in the US Senate. **And that 's who I'm striving to serve. Real Iowans -- rural and urban, Democrat and Republican, farmer, educator, retiree, health professional, shop worker, vet, citizen, and immigrant. It will take effort, judgment, empathy, and vision to bring America back from these dire days; I am encouraged that _The Des Moines Register_ views the future like I do. ** **We can do this!****** From the fields of northwest Iowa where I grew up, to our growing urban downtowns -- everyone deserves to have their perspective heard and represented in Washington. **Please, read the note from my campaign below with some of the quotes from the endorsement, and[ _consider making a donation to help us build momentum around this amazing moment._](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bf/33365068/4a712c56/3f8bfe2f/218373429/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200509_em_fr_dmrkick_all_l1")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bf/33365068/4a712c56/3f8bfe28/218373429/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200509_em_fr_dmrkick_all_abx10")

Mike Franken

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Now is not the time to toss reason aside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Team-

First of all -- I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As always, our campaign team remains dedicated to serving our TX-22 community, so please feel free to reach out to us if there is any way we can be of service to you at this time. [info@sri2020.com]

The last few weeks have undoubtedly been hard for all of us as we try to navigate this “new normal” and do our best to stop the spread of COVID. Families all across Texas are experiencing new hardships -- financial, medical, and personal. Just like you, my campaign team and I are anxious to return to some semblance of life before social distancing.

But as eager as we are, we refuse to be led down a path that ignores expert medical guidance.

As we begin to reopen Texas and put in the hard work necessary to jump start our economy, we need to make sure we’re doing all we can to take smart steps forward, so we do not fall two steps back.

But with salons and barbershops reopening, and gyms following, it’s clear that our state leaders are not doing their due-diligence to keep Texans safe and on the road to recovery.

We can do better, and we must demand better.

Join my campaign by signing your name to our petition to tell our state officials to put science first so we can keep Texans healthy and not risk further harming our economy. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-ZuNfdFJgUCHQ-ZJxfeSyg2]

Thank you for all you do,
Sri

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_pet_2020.05.09_SPK_b1_all&amount=15]

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b2f3d859-3892-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/dc78ef63-4292-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzc4ZWY2My00MjkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8M8qn_VERA4EWVtI1Rt_KdoA_Mh_EuTMAMIEi4lUQP0=&id=117373579&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Amash?=
subject: Ending illegal wars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AMASH FOR AMERICA EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE**
body:
Justin knows how important it is to restore Congress's constitutional role in declaring war, and that's why he has committed to pulling our troops out | | |
---
| | [ ](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=af09698064&e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| |
Friends,

There are so many reasons we need Justin in the White House, but one of the most urgent is to stop lawless assertions of presidential power—especially when it comes to sending our men and women in uniform into harm's way.

Justin knows how important it is to restore Congress's constitutional role in declaring war, **and that's why he has committed to pulling our troops out of unauthorized wars after his first 90 days in office unless Congress authorizes them.**

[**You can help make it happen by donating today.**](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=6f041698a6&e=b1055dcfe8)

---
| [CHIP IN >>](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=2e7e787f74&e=b1055dcfe8 "CHIP IN >>")
---
| Under our Constitution, Congress—the branch of government closest to the people—declares war, and the president conducts the war once Congress has authorized it. The president has authority to repel sudden attacks, but any military engagement beyond that requires approval from Congress.

This system stops presidents from bolstering their power by starting new wars on their own, and it helps prevent the government from going to war without the support of the American people.

But presidents of both parties have gradually chipped away at this division of power.

Just this week, President Trump vetoed legislation passed by Congress to disapprove unauthorized military actions against Iran, and he [issued a statement](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=b2674c4895&e=b1055dcfe8) asserting an inaccurate and dangerously broad interpretation of his military authority under the Constitution.

Like President Obama before him, Trump is eroding the right of the American people to be heard in the decision to send the nation to war.

Most members of Congress prefers to look the other way when presidents do this because it helps them avoid accountability. They can claim they supported it all along if things goes well, and that they never supported it if things go poorly.

**Breaking Congress out of this habit of cowardice will require a president who is willing to force Congress to do its job—authorize the wars or we're bringing the troops home.**

[**Justin is the only candidate we can trust to do this. Can we count on you to give now to help put Justin in White House?**](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=80dab415c4&e=b1055dcfe8)

—Team Amash

name: Thank You, Ruth Bader Ginsburg! (via VPP)
subject: She's fighting for us... from the hospital!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04aa/72412298/4f41e439/6104a337/3795281482/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200509_RBG_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200509_RBG_U2_X1")

| | Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg has proven once again that when it comes to defending a woman's right to choose she is UNSTOPPABLE. **Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg has proven once again that when it comes to defending a woman 's right to choose she is UNSTOPPABLE.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04aa/72412298/4f41e439/6104a336/3795281482/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200509_RBG_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200509_RBG_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200509_RBG_U2_X1") Not even a trip to hospital stops this HERO! On every issue we hold most dear, Ruth Bader Ginsburg ALWAYS has our back. **Peter, RBG is bound to be attacked by the GOP in the coming days for her advocacy -- so we need to OVERWHELM her with support right now! ****[We need 10,000 of our digital supporters to sign her thank you card in the next 24 hours! name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: The USPS needs your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
The United States Postal Service is under serious financial strain. It will require federal assistance to stay fully operational. President Trump, however, is threatening to deny necessary funding to the USPS unless it drastically raises its prices.
Politicians should _not_ dictate the USPS' pricing and the livelihood of our national postal service should certainly _not_ be on the chopping block.
**That 's why I'm standing up to the Trump Administration to demand it supply the USPS with adequate funding. [Will you stand with me by co-signing my petition?](https://act.myngp.com/el/zUpBcLP7eHSryrilrd7GNkFS4nPBtr7bfqh5tgQol48=/ltKsw4ADL-Xk9jOljd15PNx4xRGJgsl3PM_p1BeJo8g=)**
**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zUpBcLP7eHSryrilrd7GNkFS4nPBtr7bfqh5tgQol48=/ltKsw4ADL-Xk9jOljd15PNx4xRGJgsl3PM_p1BeJo8g=)**
The USPS connects Americans near and far; it is foundational to our economy _and_ our democracy. In a year that will likely see a higher number of people voting by mail than ever before, we need a fully functional postal system now, more than ever.
[**Show your support for the USPS | SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zUpBcLP7eHSryrilrd7GNkFS4nPBtr7bfqh5tgQol48=/ltKsw4ADL-Xk9jOljd15PNx4xRGJgsl3PM_p1BeJo8g=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zUpBcLP7eHSryrilrd7GNkFS4nPBtr7bfqh5tgQol48=/ltKsw4ADL-Xk9jOljd15PNx4xRGJgsl3PM_p1BeJo8g=)

Thank you for taking action,
\--_Linda S anchez_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zUpBcLP7eHSryrilrd7GNkFS4nPBtr7bfqh5tgQol48=/FBhh20sXoPsN7B8fpU6VOLe4exnTPocYV35twLQIc48=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/zUpBcLP7eHSryrilrd7GNkFS4nPBtr7bfqh5tgQol48=/T2L8gKNFqce8kcfakgtyg8yK-umpN-Cx_3DsIaWkH_E=)
Paid for by Stand with Sánchez

415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States
