name: Breaking News (via ChristyForCongress.org)
subject: 3 days left to save this seat from a GOP takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

Trump just CAN'T STOP tweeting about our race.

Just today, he went on a Twitter rant _advocating_ for voter suppression in California -- saying that the votes in one of the largest African American communities in CA-25 "must not count." He even called the entire election "rigged" and a "scam."

Trump and the GOP hope a win on Tuesday for them takes the heat off their failed leadership during this crisis. **And they're not wrong. A blue-to-red flip in CA-25 sends a dangerous message about Trump's handling of this pandemic.**

**[We only have 3 days left to save this seat from a GOP takeover. Will you pitch in $5 -- or whatever you can afford -- to make sure we can win?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1884/3819115149/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1885/3819115149/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1886/3819115149/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1887/3819115149/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1880/3819115149/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1881/3819115149/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1884/3819115149/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2")
Trump is calling the sensible act of opening more in-person polling places (because not everyone _can_ vote by mail) a "scam" and a way to "rig" the election. It's something the local Republican mayor, a Trump supporter himself, called for.

**Let's be clear: Every voter should be able to cast their vote and have it counted in this race.** But once again, if Republicans can't count on your vote, they don't want it counted at all.

**Their game plan to win -- here in California, but around the country too -- has been built on an audacious wave of efforts to suppress votes,** particularly those of people of color, students, and low-income communities.

Why? Because when it comes down to it, voters don't like the GOP agenda of stripping away health care from millions, giving tax breaks to billionaires while leaving working families out to dry, and the utter failure to adequately prepare and protect us from COVID-19.

**[But if they win here in CA-25 on Tuesday, the GOP will be more emboldened than ever to advance their reckless, dangerous, and downright deadly priorities. Pitch $5 right now to save this seat from a GOP takeover>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1884/3819115149/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2")**

With so much on the line, thank you for everything you are doing to finish this race strong. I'm proud to be fighting alongside you.

\-- Kunal

Kunal Atit
Deputy Campaign Manager

[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1884/3819115149/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfdHJ1bXByci1zMiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_trumprr-s2")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|

777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f1883/3819115149/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe9/29776869/a64343c/569f189c/3819115149/VEsHBw/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Dem Senate Update
subject: Mitch McConnell is SPEECHLESS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Republicans may FINALLY pay the price for their corruption - but we need your help.
| | |
---
**INSIDER TRADING ALLEGATIONS PUT GOP SENATE SEAT IN DANGER!**
Friend, this outrageous GOP corruption just changed _everything :_
_**FIRST : **_Un-elected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) attended a private briefing on the impending threat of COVID-19 - and instead of alerting the public, sold off MILLIONS in stock before the market crashed.
**_THEN : _**After coming under fire for potential insider trading, polling shows Loeffler locked in a dead heat with her Democratic opponent Reverend Raphael Warnock - in a race that _The Washington Post_ says is key to deciding Senate control!
**_NOW_**** _:_** We've learned Loeffler (R) has loaned a staggering $10 MILLION of her personal fortune to rescue her campaign, and Mitch McConnell is lining up the GOP establishment to keep this seat red and maintain his iron grip on the Senate.
**Friend, we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to flip this seat and take back the Senate, but the only way we 'll counter the GOP's megadonors is with grassroots support from people like you. Reverend Warnock (D) needs to raise another $7,436 by midnight tonight, but we're still falling incredibly short. With time running out, we're counting on your immediate support:**
**[_Please, will you rush a contribution of $5 or more right now - as much as you can afford - to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to Washington?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7c7/288179be/bacb9be/348e9947/3112405970/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjA2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk206-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Jordan from Team Tina
subject: 60 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Today marks the 60th anniversary of the FDA approval of the birth control pill — changing our country, the world, and the very way we live. **One pill has literally reshaped the lives of women, men, and families everywhere by allowing women to plan their own futures in ways they never could before it was available and accessible.** Now — _in the year 2020!_ — we are just days removed from the latest attempt by the GOP to allow employers to deny birth control coverage because of personal or religious objections. On Wednesday, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Trump v. Pennsylvania_ , a case that could have far-reaching implications for the provision of the Affordable Care Act that expands coverage for contraception for over 60 million women nationwide. You read that right — _60 million._ **It’s shocking and appalling that in the midst of a public crisis, Donald Trump and his administration are attacking access to reproductive health care for millions of women.** **[If you agree that reproductive freedom and access to contraception should not be dictated by the personal beliefs of employers, add your name to our petition today. You can do so right here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17437404/194264178/1524435714?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFiMTBmNS01YzkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1c9TU2Rn2XKJNbkbrZoyxWVe5U9HAgNc4-QjUd8bZ1c=&emci=f21b10f5-5c92-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f51b10f5-5c92-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17437405/194264179/1524435714?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFiMTBmNS01YzkyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1c9TU2Rn2XKJNbkbrZoyxWVe5U9HAgNc4-QjUd8bZ1c=&emci=f21b10f5-5c92-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f51b10f5-5c92-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)

We must speak up now to condemn what would be a tragic setback for the fight for women’s health and equality everywhere. Sign your name today.
Thanks for taking action.
— Jordan
Jordan Foster
Digital Director
Tina for Minnesota

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: 3 new programs to provide relief
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Today marks the start of Phase 1 of our plan to reopen Rhode Island and begin the difficult work of revitalizing our economy. While we look towards the future, we cannot forget that there are Rhode Islanders across the state who are suffering from the financial devastation of COVID-19. We have an obligation to do everything we can to help our neighbors during this moment of need.
Today, I'm excited to announce 3 new steps we're taking to help Rhode Island families during this crisis.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmP9e25iT_W41Ke4YOA_nn_NkZc6DcuX8HI4qumplSDhiLPGW4N_sJEo_zSseV-DkohHEACzNhwnBz9mVOSOutGhep0HLQAGywbc9P2q50wSjoMborKaRtYIn0T83lg4u0Dg6LHGtN1bNMaVE_x68Yyz0WS8l2B5lBSqL7bQXpEGJJ0BZwVd6rAY5--NehOxbyCdOIhrDMk=&c=a6dn2LQNe9e104xayLXLj9s6peejxybxpT4VOobwNRGuADM7xxw6FA==&ch=aeVUU9fOfav39NmqHAx_XlWSALB75ZgnoiLnD4o-hw5vjypLZKSETw==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmP9e25iT_W41Ke4YOA_nn_NkZc6DcuX8HI4qumplSDhiLPGW4N_sJEo_zSseV-DkohHEACzNhwnBz9mVOSOutGhep0HLQAGywbc9P2q50wSjoMborKaRtYIn0T83lg4u0Dg6LHGtN1bNMaVE_x68Yyz0WS8l2B5lBSqL7bQXpEGJJ0BZwVd6rAY5--NehOxbyCdOIhrDMk=&c=a6dn2LQNe9e104xayLXLj9s6peejxybxpT4VOobwNRGuADM7xxw6FA==&ch=aeVUU9fOfav39NmqHAx_XlWSALB75ZgnoiLnD4o-hw5vjypLZKSETw==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| 1) Student Loans
We know that more than 130,000 Rhode Islanders of all ages have student loan debt. And for those who are struggling financially, student loan payments add to an already-great burden.
That's why I'm thrilled that Rhode Island has partnered with [Summer](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmP9e25iT_W41Ke4YOA_nn_NkZc6DcuX8HI4qumplSDhiLPGW4N_sO2jesCv2vRrJXZb7wpt7QLWW_6wvnLWer3F7vcAdY6wUrfMQfWYdnNRxZICt2UvT2nXXFBrQdc0ROPTSzFhUISiM5VIkQ-BFDFdpueQEJ5Ti-p80qJQZAFdAEBusL28QvnYQaKE75w0xj4OYtdk7xp-QAnCy3kOSoge87UWIyP0Uw3R0lSgCsGistOtHvG1sflzi3FvHegl&c=a6dn2LQNe9e104xayLXLj9s6peejxybxpT4VOobwNRGuADM7xxw6FA==&ch=aeVUU9fOfav39NmqHAx_XlWSALB75ZgnoiLnD4o-hw5vjypLZKSETw==), a student loan advisory service that helps borrowers identify which loan assistance programs they're eligible for and then helps them to enroll. Summer is now offering their services to Rhode Islanders at no cost to borrowers or the state.
This program is specifically for borrowers who have suffered financially during this crisis. Borrowers who have experienced a significant reduction in income could be eligible for a reduced monthly payment in a federal Income-Driven Repayment plan. With the average borrower paying approximately $300/month on student loans, an IDR plan can result in an annual savings of $3,600. Summer's digital platform will help Rhode Island residents determine their eligibility and facilitate the application process if they qualify.
I'm glad the federal government has taken the important step of pausing payments on all Federal Direct loans, and that the Rhode Island [Student Loan Authority](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmP9e25iT_W41Ke4YOA_nn_NkZc6DcuX8HI4qumplSDhiLPGW4N_sO2jesCv2vRr_kwFDvbbfEQZQTucACZi-MeWJawpYGKv3GfVVDZf8ZjaL7UKu2OEXZ_Vy0K5K8X_0VVpu0VuuUM=&c=a6dn2LQNe9e104xayLXLj9s6peejxybxpT4VOobwNRGuADM7xxw6FA==&ch=aeVUU9fOfav39NmqHAx_XlWSALB75ZgnoiLnD4o-hw5vjypLZKSETw==) is suspending monthly loan payments for up to 3 months for those whose income has been negatively impacted by this pandemic. But we know that there are thousands of Rhode Islanders who still have to make payments on other types of loans. That's where Summer can help.
2) Utilities
The longer this crisis goes on and the longer people are out of work, the harder things get. There's no question that this crisis is going to have the harshest effects on those who can least afford it, and it's important that folks know when relief is available. Earlier this week, the Public Utilities Commission voted to extend an order that electric, gas, water, and sewer service cannot be shut off or sent to a collection agency through May 31. This applies to both residential and non-residential customers.
3) Food Security
Since this crisis began, our entire federal delegation has worked hard to secure funding for the Coronavirus Food Assistance Program (CFAP). Through CFAP, the US Department of Agriculture partners with local food distributors whose workforces and supply chains have been harmed by this pandemic. Yesterday, our congressional delegation announced that USDA approved the application of two of Rhode Island's essential and innovative nonprofit organizations - [Farm Fresh Rhode Island](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmP9e25iT_W41Ke4YOA_nn_NkZc6DcuX8HI4qumplSDhiLPGW4N_sO2jesCv2vRrUPZ8jDC1bv4pKrguW788jqFTSobOYVIkmU0RV7EWotfNyAGI5U95snSMJu4gHkM0hrkS0auQcucOnpfs7vCm6Q==&c=a6dn2LQNe9e104xayLXLj9s6peejxybxpT4VOobwNRGuADM7xxw6FA==&ch=aeVUU9fOfav39NmqHAx_XlWSALB75ZgnoiLnD4o-hw5vjypLZKSETw==) and the [Rhode Island Community Food Bank](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmP9e25iT_W41Ke4YOA_nn_NkZc6DcuX8HI4qumplSDhiLPGW4N_sO2jesCv2vRrtJD9Q4t2Vi3Kzqet5CjAojbNx2P2t_3bQ3V4qk8FwNVhQ2x7OlcUndKXuluaq4YRBOlY0_isErZ3hhtmJbFM3A==&c=a6dn2LQNe9e104xayLXLj9s6peejxybxpT4VOobwNRGuADM7xxw6FA==&ch=aeVUU9fOfav39NmqHAx_XlWSALB75ZgnoiLnD4o-hw5vjypLZKSETw==) - for the Farmers to Families Food Box program. Through this initiative, USDA will fund the sourcing, assembly, and distribution of food boxes.
By the end of this month, Farm Fresh Rhode Island and the Rhode Island Community Food Bank will begin distributing 500 boxes of healthy, fresh, local food to food-insecure families in our state every week. This provides an important path forward for our farmers and growers during this difficult time and helps our neighbors who are facing food insecurity.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmP9e25iT_W41Ke4YOA_nn_NkZc6DcuX8HI4qumplSDhiLPGW4N_sO2jesCv2vRrJopR-i3A8iU5sosL3Qxop623aO-mZ8q1qy2dDVADL6VJFAweDKRlYxcDTh6NmG0mvPORyDEqyJoLbVjk48vwv_kIA_VrnN5dNMbUyEf2xdPPQVidlinK-3s2VPOdq5qOJhND7eNT4rW-3EIFOeYb6MO9eOjOkYT-&c=a6dn2LQNe9e104xayLXLj9s6peejxybxpT4VOobwNRGuADM7xxw6FA==&ch=aeVUU9fOfav39NmqHAx_XlWSALB75ZgnoiLnD4o-hw5vjypLZKSETw==)
---
| I know there are still many obstacles for us to overcome before all Rhode Islanders recover--physically and economically--from this crisis. In the meantime, I will continue to fight for relief so you and your family can stay healthy and safe.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmP9e25iT_W41Ke4YOA_nn_NkZc6DcuX8HI4qumplSDhiLPGW4N_sO2jesCv2vRrDLbQkBCx6wgna6W1biRHZydxrYUDdBaj49SA5TqQjbM_JT7ugi4nxu-Ju-R_Uc5l5rjuD1WbSVX7PYKJa-iSdYsgpznQDSUVCf0Y_JSxcT1AIK2i9LHXSA8jNMNorPFj_i1YpJCkr19JeIz6Jbk4cQEYW8M1lzQZFaX074enKfKD7kYJBop6QqlaEZPUJdYTA8qk_3iEg-Byf-XKq1HrJZQRGsOGZ192hI4xsUrv5qf-JmAcPERUYA_tq5qlbw9L6kFLwKuWRg0=&c=a6dn2LQNe9e104xayLXLj9s6peejxybxpT4VOobwNRGuADM7xxw6FA==&ch=aeVUU9fOfav39NmqHAx_XlWSALB75ZgnoiLnD4o-hw5vjypLZKSETw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

name: Kathy Manning
subject: We need to protect the postal service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
so everyone can safely vote this year ->
|
---

| | It's staggering -- coronavirus has impacted nearly every aspect of our daily life: work, school, health care. It could also have a potentially devastating effect on voting rights if we don't do something about it. There are two vital steps we need to take to make sure everyone can safely exercise their right to vote in November:
1. **Expand voting by mail everywhere**
2. **Give the Postal Service the critical aid it needs to withstand the pandemic**

[_**Add your name and urge the Trump Administration and Congress to give the USPS the emergency aid it needs to ensure everyone can safely vote by mail in November.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d30e/3d199a51/2f4bf28f/7364f927/3445872005/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200509p_ncm") Fewer than 5% of North Carolina voters mail in their ballots but that figure could jump to 40% this year due to the coronavirus pandemic. If we don't take action now to accommodate for these changes in voting, it could threaten the health of those who feel forced to cast their ballots in person. In North Carolina, voting rights advocates are fighting to make voting by mail easier by providing pre-paid postage and loosening excessive and burdensome requirements so voters can confidently make their voices heard on Election Day while protecting their health and helping stop the spread of the coronavirus. **But any effort we take to bolster voting by mail will be undermined if we don 't also give the Postal Service the critical aid it needs.** The USPS plays an essential role in vote-by-mail efforts, but right now, it's in danger of running out of funding by this fall. Without aid, the Postal Service might not be able to get mail-in ballots to voters and return them to election officials. **At every turn, President Trump and his Administration have failed to respond to the coronavirus pandemic. We can 't allow their failures and inaction to threaten the integrity of elections this November, too.** [_**ADD YOUR NAME ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d30e/3d199a51/2f4bf28f/7364f924/3445872005/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200509p_ncm") Thank you for taking action today. Kathy |
---

---

name: Team Christy
subject: Can you help with this last-minute ad-buy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

We'll keep this short: Last night's ballot returns are out -- **and we're still down.**

We're getting closer, but not at the rate at which we need.

**Even worse, we're being outspent on the air by Mike Garcia.**

There's a reason this race has been rated as a "Toss-Up" by so many pundits: It's simply so difficult to predict what will happen in this almost entirely vote-by-mail election. And our voters don't turn out regularly for special elections like the Republicans do.

**We are doing every single thing we can to defeat Mike Garcia -- but it's clear that we have to step it up for the final three days.**

**[We have a last-minute ad-buy in the works -- but we need you to step up now to get it up in time. Can you chip in $5 or anything you can to help do _everything_ possible to win on Tuesday? ](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe4/29776869/a6787c3/569f1a66/557523764/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNC1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_milliongoal14-s3")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe4/29776869/a6787c3/569f1a67/557523764/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNC1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_milliongoal14-s3&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbe4/29776869/a6787c3/569f1a60/557523764/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDlfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNC1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200509_milliongoal14-s3&express_lane=true&amount=25")
